body.title: agent_datacenter — runtime substrate for Igor and future agent deployments
body.result: All 4 phases shipped: Phase 1 (foundations + registry + IMAP bus + skeleton + access control + router + health rollup, commits 4159133/82fbbda/6ddb3bf/a2989ef), Phase 2-3 (igor + inference + claude devices + YGM nudge pipeline, commit 0669cb5), Phase 4 (DiscordBot + SWADL devices + shims, commit 3850610). Project lives at /home/akien/dev/src/agent_datacenter (editable-install in TheIgors venv, runtime at ~/.agent_datacenter/). Spec path in ticket was outdated. Closed 2026-05-01 per Akien audit review.
body.description:
Build agent_datacenter: a runtime substrate that provides uniform device lifecycle management, a real IMAP-backed communications bus, and a self-describing device model. Every component (Postgres, Igor, Claude, inference, web server, Discord) is a device with the same interface and is operable the same way.

**Spec:** /home/akien/TheIgorsProject/akien/ideas/agent_datacenter.txt — includes directory tree, design notes (founding decisions), and 4-phase build order.

**Affected files:**
- /home/akien/TheIgorsProject/agent_datacenter/ (new package, per directory tree in spec)
- /home/akien/TheIgorsProject/akien/ideas/agent_datacenter.txt (spec — updated with tree + design notes)

**Design rules:**
- oop-first: device base class + shim base class are the foundation; everything inherits.
- docs-in-code: each device ticket must include a shim spec alongside the device spec (per spec §The Shim).
- no-sqlite: IMAP server (Dovecot or embedded Python) + Postgres only; no SQLite anywhere.
- test-plan-or-why-not: contract tests verify every registered device implements the full interface.

**Scope boundary:**
- IN: 4-phase build — (1) skeleton + IMAP bus + Postgres device, (2) Igor base class refactor + web server, (3) Claude device + YGM/Nudge, (4) Discord + SWADL + deferred devices.
- OUT: swarm-level computer topology (one level up), OpenClaw skills layer (above this), multi-datacenter federation, C&A workflow logic.

**Test plan:**
- tests/test_device_contract.py — verify every registered device implements who_am_i, health, ops, comms.
- tests/test_skeleton.py — registration, health rollup, namespace collision hard-fail.
- tests/test_bus.py — IMAP mailbox creation, routing, IDLE, 24hr retention policy.
- Per-phase child tickets each carry their own test plan at filing time.

**Filing note:** This is a tracking ticket. Phase-level child tickets are filed at implementation time, one phase at a time. Sprint this ticket only when starting Phase 1.
